prestazioni: Engine swap to a Pontiac 421 Super Duty (engine code: 421-SD) with forged internals including Manley 4340 steel connecting rods, JE 12.5:1 forged pistons, and a Comp Cams XE284HR hydraulic roller camshaft (236°/242° duration, 0.540" lift) for high-RPM power retention

Custom-built Holley Dominator 1050 CFM carburetor with billet metering blocks, annular boosters, and a Mallory HyFire VI CD ignition system for precise fuel delivery and spark timing under extreme loads

Full exhaust system featuring 2.5" mandrel-bent stainless steel headers by Hooker Super Competition, paired with a 3.5" dual-exhaust setup terminating in Flowmaster 44 Series Delta Flow mufflers for aggressive tone without drone
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using reproduction 1965 Pontiac 2+2 fender flares (fiberglass) and rear quarter panel extensions to fit 10.5" Mickey Thompson ET Street R drag radials on Weld Racing RT-S wheels (15x10 front, 15x12 rear)

Full custom interior with Recaro SRD bucket seats (Pontiac-specific mounting brackets), a Grant GT steering wheel with a Pontiac arrowhead horn button, and a retrofitted Vintage Air Gen IV SureFit climate control system for modern comfort

Custom paint scheme in PPG Deltron "Limefire" with blacked-out trim, including a reproduction 1964 LeMans GTO-style hood scoop (functional) and a custom rear spoiler by RK Sport, modeled after the 1965 Pontiac Banshee concept
